mapper.select: SELECT 'Y' AS inspectionYn, info.* FROM DOCS_DRAWING info WHERE DRAWING_NO = #{drawingNo} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_COUNT FROM DOCS_COMPANY WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'
AND BIZ_NO LIKE '%' || #{bizNo} || '%'
AND COMPANY_NM LIKE '%' || #{companyNm} || '%'
mapper.insert:
SELECT NEXTVAL('DOCS_DESTROY_SEQ') AS destroyNo
INSERT INTO DOCS_DESTROY (DESTROY_NO) VALUES (#{destroyNo})
mapper.select: SELECT REQUEST_NO AS requestNo, OBJECT_ID AS objectId FROM DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING WHERE REQUEST_NO IN ( SELECT REQUEST_NO FROM DOCS_REQUEST WHERE DEPLOY_COMPANY_CD = #{companyCd} AND REQUEST_TYPE = 'DISTRIBUTION' )
mapper.insert:
SELECT TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-X' || LPAD(COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(DESTROY_REQUEST_NO FROM 11 FOR 4)::INT), 0) + 1, 4, '0') AS DESTROY_REQUEST_NO FROM DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST WHERE SUBSTRING(DESTROY_REQUEST_NO, 1, 10) = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-X'
INSERT INTO DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST ( DESTROY_REQUEST_NO, APPROVAL_LINE_ID, CURRENT_PROCESS_SEQ_NO, STATUS_CD, INSERT_USER_CD, INSERT_DT, APPROVAL_DT, DESTROY_TYPE, DESTROY_STATUS_CD, BUSINESS_AREA_CD ) VALUES ( #{destroyRequestNo}, '5', '1', 'APPROVAL', #{sessionUser.userCd}, CURRENT_DATE, CURRENT_DATE, '3', '1', (SELECT BUSINESS_AREA_CD FROM DOCS_REQUEST WHERE REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo}) )

INSERT INTO DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST_DETAIL ( DESTROY_REQUEST_NO, PROCESS_SEQ, APPROVAL_STATUS_CD, ACTION_CD, ORIGINAL_USER_CD, ACTUAL_USER_CD, ACTION_DT ) VALUES ( #{destroyRequestNo}, #{processSeq}, #{approvalStatusCd}, 'APPROVAL', #{sessionUser.userCd}, #{sessionUser.userCd}, CURRENT_DATE )
INSERT INTO DOCS_DESTROY_REQUEST_MAPPING ( REQUEST_NO, OBJECT_ID, DESTROY_REQUEST_NO, DEPLOY_USER_CD ) VALUES ( #{requestNo}, #{objectId}, #{destroyRequestNo}, #{sessionUser.userCd} )
mapper.select: SELECT APPROVAL_STATUS_CD AS approvalStatusCd, APPROVAL_GRADE_CD AS approvalGradeCd FROM DOCS_APPROVAL_LINE_DETAIL WHERE APPROVAL_LINE_ID = #{approvalLineId} ORDER BY PROCESS_SEQ_NO
mapper.update: UPDATE DOCS_REQUEST_FILE SET DESTROY_TYPE = '3', DESTROY_STATUS_CD = '1' WHERE REQUEST_NO IN ( SELECT fileInfo.REQUEST_NO FROM DOCS_REQUEST request INNER JOIN ( SELECT REQUEST_NO FROM DOCS_REQUEST_FILE GROUP BY REQUEST_NO ) fileInfo ON fileInfo.REQUEST_NO = request.REQUEST_NO WHERE DEPLOY_COMPANY_CD = #{companyCd} AND REQUEST_TYPE = 'DISTRIBUTION' )
